max.name: Max Hero Actions
max.hint: Set a cap on Hero Actions the party can have in their hand

hand.name: Hand - Card Stack ID
hand.hint: The ID of the card stack that represents the party's Hero Point hand

discard.name: Discard - Card Stack ID
discard.hint: The ID of the card stack that represents the party's Hero Point Discard Pile

hero-actions.name: Hero Action - Card Stack ID
hero-actions.hint: The ID of the card stack that represents the party's Hero Action Draw Pile

enabled.name: Enable Animations
enabled.hint: Enables animation of cards on draw, play, and discard

volume.name: Animation Volume
volume.hint: Set the volume of all animations

enable.name: Message on Hero Point Actions
enable.hint: Create a messages whenever someone Plays, Draws, or Discards a Hero Action

empty.name: Draw Remaining Hero Action Cards?
empty.description: Click Me to draw the remaining hero action cards

body.play: {name} spent a hero point to play {card}{cardData}

warning.not-enough-hp: FYI your character {name} doesn't have enough Hero Points to use this action
